texto: Look at a football field. It looks like a big movie screen. This is theatre. Football combines the strategy of chess. It's part ballet. It's part battleground, part playground. We clarify, amplify and glorify the game with our footage, the narration and that music, and in the end create an inspirational piece of footage.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Steve Sabol: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Look at a football field. It looks like a big movie screen. This is theatre. Football combines th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, music, football pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.

frase_original: Look at a football field. It looks like a big movie screen. This is theatre. Football combines the strategy of chess. It's part ballet. It's part battleground, part playground. We clarify, amplify and glorify the game with our footage, the narration and that music, and in the end create an inspirational piece of footage.

texto: When my father bid $5,000 for the 1962 Championship Game, that was a huge amount. It was double the bid the year before. Pete Rozelle was flabbergasted. Who was this guy who was willing to spend so much money on what seemed like relatively worthless rights to the NFL Championship Game?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Steve Sabol: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “When my father bid $5,000 for the 1962 Championship Game, that was a huge amount. It was double t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, father, game pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e game.

frase_original: When my father bid $5,000 for the 1962 Championship Game, that was a huge amount. It was double the bid the year before. Pete Rozelle was flabbergasted. Who was this guy who was willing to spend so much money on what seemed like relatively worthless rights to the NFL Championship Game?

texto: I think in the NFL knowledge is power, and you try to get the knowledge by whatever means.
explicacao: Citação de Steve Sabol sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I think in the NFL knowledge is power, and you try to get the knowledge by whatever means.” articula reflexao, power, knowledge-is-power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como knowledge-is-power.
